latin: Alii homines mundum ardere videre volunt. quidam rationem non habent, pretium non quaerunt. solum destructionem amant. tales homines intellegi non possunt.

questions.prompt: What do some men just want?
Why can such people not be reasoned with?
questions.target: They have no logic or desire for reward
choices: They have no logic or desire for reward

translation: Some men just want to watch the world burn. Some have no reason, seek no reward. They only love destruction. Such people cannot be understood.
